ResearchProjectDef.label: airless heating
ResearchProjectDef.description: Construct an oven that can heat materials to high temperatures in the absense of air.

rulesStrings.li: subject->airless heating
subject_story->accidentally lit a coal pile on fire
subject_story->has experience baking in ovens
subject_story->left the cover on a furnace and accidentally starved it of air
subject_gerund->refined coal to burn hotter

ResearchProjectDef.label: blast furnace
ResearchProjectDef.description: Construct a specialised furnace that reaches the temperatures necessary to smelt certain metals.

rulesStrings.li: subject->blast furnace
subject_story->burned themselves and became facinated with fire
subject_story->experimented with enclosing fires to increase heat
subject_story->was required to produce huge amounts of alloys for a local noble
subject_gerund->alloying copper

ResearchProjectDef.label: steam generation
ResearchProjectDef.description: Burn coal or wood to produce steam for use in powering buildings.

rulesStrings.li: subject->steam generation
subject_story->boiled water to make soup for dinner
subject_story->measured how hot water has to be to boil and recorded it
subject_story->saw steam come out of a gyeser and wanted to recreate it themself
subject_gerund->producing steam for power

ResearchProjectDef.label: steam network
ResearchProjectDef.description: Set up a network that transfers and stores steam.

rulesStrings.li: subject->steam network
subject_story->captured steam for later use
subject_story->sectretly built pipes to siphon steam illegally on a steamworld
subject_story->set fire to a water tower and watched the water boil into steam
subject_gerund->controlling and storing steam

ResearchProjectDef.label: early machining
ResearchProjectDef.description: Cut parts for use in clockwork and steam engineering.

rulesStrings.li: subject->early machining
subject_story->worked as a clockmaker's apprentice
subject_story->disassembled a broken steam engine they found
subject_story->witnessed a clockwork wonder and became interested in mechanics
subject_gerund->mechanical component cutting
subject->clockwork limbs
subject_story->made machines using clockwork
subject_story->new someone who lost their arm and pitied them
subject_story->found advanced clockwork automata in a vault
subject_gerund->clockwork limb replacement
subject->clockwork organs
subject_story->improvised with materials at hand when performing sugery
subject_story->studied cadavers as a local physician's assistant
subject_story->lost someone close who could have been saved with a replacement organ
subject_gerund->clockwork organ replacement

ResearchProjectDef.label: leather treating
ResearchProjectDef.description: Treat leather to make it more durable and sanitary.

rulesStrings.li: subject->leather treating
subject_story->got annoyed at how fast leather deteriorated
subject_story->spilled something on their leather boots and realised it didn't wear out as fast as it used to
subject_story->learned leather preservation techniques from a book in an abandoned library
subject_gerund->treating leather

ResearchProjectDef.label: basic chemistry
ResearchProjectDef.description: Process raw ingredients into usable chemicals.

rulesStrings.li: subject->basic chemistry
subject_story->dissolved the bodies of people who couldn't pay back their loans
subject_story->mixed two chemicals together that produced a nauscious gas
subject_story->researched old alchemnical books and realised how certain things didn't make sense
subject_gerund->basic chemical production

ResearchProjectDef.label: aeratus tonic
ResearchProjectDef.description: Combine regents to produce life-saving aeratus tonic to combat against aeratic decay.

rulesStrings.li: subject->aeratus tonic
subject_story->got a stray arrow lodged in their body that couldn't be removed, later experiencing horrible pain
subject_story->wore so much brass jewellery that it seeped into their blood and caused it to rot
subject_story->worked producing tonics under a master chemist
subject_gerund->aeratus tonic production
